scripts.test:integration: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=$(supabase status -o env 2>/dev/null | grep '^SECRET_KEY=' | cut -d'"' -f2) vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.js
scripts.test:e2e: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=$(supabase status -o env 2>/dev/null | grep '^SECRET_KEY=' | cut -d'"' -f2) playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:ui: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=$(supabase status -o env 2>/dev/null | grep '^SECRET_KEY=' | cut -d'"' -f2) playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.js --ui
